name: UNITED STATES LIME & MINERALS INC
summary: United States Lime & Minerals, Inc. is a manufacturer of lime and limestone products incorporated in 1950, headquartered in Dallas, Texas. The company operates quarries and underground mines in Arkansas, Colorado, Louisiana, Missouri, Oklahoma, and Texas, producing crushed limestone, pulverized limestone, quicklime, hydrated lime, and lime slurry. It serves construction, industrial, environmental, metals, agriculture, roof shingle manufacturing, and oil and gas services industries, with approximately 675 customers across the United States.

products.name: Crushed Limestone
products.description: Used primarily in construction aggregates, transported by truck and rail within 400 miles of plants.

products.name: Pulverized Limestone (PLS)
products.description: Ground calcium carbonate used in roof shingles, asphalt, agriculture feeds, glass production, and flue gas treatment.

products.name: Quicklime
products.description: Calcium oxide produced by calcination; used in metal processing, flue gas treatment, soil stabilization, and water treatment.

products.name: Hydrated Lime
products.description: Calcium hydroxide used in water treatment, soil stabilization, flue gas treatment, and oil and gas drilling mud conditioning.

products.name: Lime Slurry
products.description: Suspended solution of calcium hydroxide used primarily in soil stabilization for highway, road, and building construction.
